  • Constructor Details

    • GoBildaPinpoint

      public GoBildaPinpoint(float xPodOffset, float yPodOffset, float encoderResolution, SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint.EncoderDirection xEncoderDirection, SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint.EncoderDirection yEncoderDirection)
      Parameters:
      xPodOffset - the offset of your forward tracking pod from the tracking center in millimeters
      yPodOffset - the offset of your strafe tracking pod from the tracking center in millimeters
      encoderResolution - the millimeters traveled per encoder tick
      xEncoderDirection - the direction of the forward encoder
      yEncoderDirection - the direction of the strafe encoder
